title: Tour Manager
description: Coordinate venues, travel, lodging, day-of-show logistics. Keep the tour on schedule, handle venue relationships, manage artist needs across 4 cities.

title: Sound Engineer
description: Run FOH sound, manage monitors, soundcheck, mixing during show. Need 2 engineers to rotate or cover both Dallas shows if we do the '2 for 1'.

title: Videographer / Content Lead
description: Capture every show — stage footage, crowd reactions, backstage. Edit into 3-5 viral clips per show. Own the content strategy, post-tour documentary cut.

title: Street Team Lead
description: On-the-ground promo in your city. Poster runs, Instagram story blitzes, link up with local influencers, pack the venue. You get a cut of ticket sales you drive.

title: Social Media Manager
description: Run @nsgbillz, @ssgsplurge, @10k.caash, @nikeboymeech socials leading up to and during tour. Hype content, countdown posts, live coverage, post-show recaps.
